name: POLAM Federal Credit Union
description_short: POLAM Federal Credit Union is a membership-based credit union offering home loans, auto loans, checking/savings accounts, and credit cards with access to 5,000+ shared branches nationwide.
description_long: POLAM Federal Credit Union is a federally chartered credit union serving members primarily in the Los Angeles area, with membership benefits including lower fees and competitive rates. The union offers a comprehensive range of financial products including home mortgages, auto financing, deposit accounts, credit cards, and digital banking services. As a portfolio lender, POLAM retains its home loans rather than selling them to investors, allowing for more personalized lending decisions and potential flexibility in loan structuring. The credit union distinguishes itself through its auto financing (up to 125% of purchase price including tax and license), extensive ATM and shared branching network access (30,000+ ATMs and 5,000+ branches nationwide), and integration of modern digital services like Zelle money transfers and mobile deposits. Member-owners have voting rights in annual elections and can participate in governance, which is typical of credit union structures but distinguishes them from traditional banks. POLAM is well-suited for Polish-American communities and members seeking personalized service, as evidenced by their annual meetings held at Polish churches and their community-focused approach. However, potential members should note the credit union experienced a significant office closure due to building damage (as of March 2026), requiring reliance on phone support, Orange County office access, and shared branching during repairs. The organization appears operationally sound with established phone support (800-404-5137) and backup service partnerships in place. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Portfolio lender retains mortgages in-house, potentially offering more flexible terms than banks that sell loans
Auto loans finance up to 125% of purchase price including tax, license, and optional GAP coverage
Access to 30,000+ ATMs and 5,000+ shared branches throughout the United States
Member-owner governance with voting rights in annual elections and board nominations
Free Zelle money transfer integration for peer-to-peer payments
Home loan assistance programs to help members facing payment difficulties
cons: Los Angeles office building closed indefinitely as of March 2026 due to structural damage, requiring members to use phone support or travel to Orange County or shared branches
No mail-in voting allowed for annual elections per bylaws, requiring in-person attendance or proxy arrangements
Limited information on website regarding savings account rates, CD terms, or other deposit product details
Credit card and loan APR/rate information not provided on website homepage
Geographic focus suggests strongest service in Los Angeles area despite national shared branching access
best_for: Members seeking home mortgages with a lender that retains loans in-house for personalized service
Borrowers needing auto loans with high loan-to-value ratios (up to 125%) and flexible terms
Polish-American community members in the Los Angeles area seeking culturally-connected financial services
Credit union members who value ownership voting rights and cooperative governance structures
diagnosis: POLAM Federal Credit Union is best for members in the Los Angeles area seeking personalized lending (especially mortgages and auto loans) through a member-owned institution with national branch access. Primary caveat: the organization's primary office is currently closed due to building damage (as of March 2026), so members should verify current service availability before joining or expect temporary service disruptions through phone and alternative locations.
services: Auto loans (up to 125% LTV with flexible terms)
Home loan assistance/mortgage payment help programs
Access to 5,000+ shared branches and 30,000+ ATMs
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 589 N Larchmont Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90004
